'''''327-A''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] operated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was part of Admiral [[Wooyou Senn]]'s [[Task Force Vengeance]].

During a reprisal raid against the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam]] [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|X7 Factory]] ''[[Gallofree]]'' at the [[Mobetta system/Legends|Mobetta system]], the ''327-A'', ''[[327-B]]'' and ''[[327-C]]'' were assigned to attack the factory and the transports evacuating it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
